diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,171 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: src/hono (Hono), src/hono-base, src/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory pattern helper for creating Hono apps with custom initializations and handler composition
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: src/context (Context), src/utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper for extracting matched routes and path information from request context
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSContext, WSMessageReceive, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: src/context (Context), src/types (MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse), src/utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for creating WebSocket adapters with event handling and context management
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: src/context (Context), src/utils/cookie (parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for getting, setting, and parsing cookies with secure and signed cookie support
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: src/client (hc, Client, ClientRequestOptions), src/context (ExecutionContext), src/hono (Hono), src/types (Schema), src/utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper for creating test clients with custom fetch implementation
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime
+- Reads as: src/context (Context)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter/helper runtime detector for environment variables and platform detection
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: raw, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, type exports from './common'
+- Reads as: src/helper/html (raw), src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, ./common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for handling styled JSX and CSS utilities in Hono
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, rawCssString, minify, cx, keyframes
+- Reads as: (self-contained)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities providing symbols, helpers for class names, style processing, and minification
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: src/http-exception (HTTPException), src/utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for creating proxy requests to external URLs with header handling and RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: src/hono (Hono), src/types (Env, RouterRoute), src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting and displaying registered routes and router information
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: raw, html
+- Reads as: src/utils/html (escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString), HtmlEscaped, HtmlEscapedString, StringBufferWithCallbacks
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper for rendering escaped HTML with template strings and callback support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Re-exports from SSG module
+- Reads as: ./ssg (defaultFileSystem, defaultPlugin), ./middleware (SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG), ./plugins (defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper index file that re-exports all Static Site Generator utilities from ssg.ts, middleware.ts, and plugins.ts
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: generateStaticFiles, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult, BeforeRequestHook, AfterResponseHook, AfterGenerateHook, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin
+- Reads as: ./client/utils (replaceUrlParam), ./middleware (SSG-related items), ./utils (dirname, ensureWithinOutDir, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, joinPaths), src/hono, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic for generating static files from app routes with hooks and plugins for lifecycle management
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: src/hono (Hono), src/router (METHOD_NAME_ALL), src/types (Env, RouterRoute), src/utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including path manipulation, static route filtering, and dynamic route detection
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: ./utils (isDynamicRoute)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware providing context and helpers for static site generation control
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, SSEStreamingApi, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse (SSEStreamingApi), ./text (streamText)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper index file re-exporting stream, SSE, and text streaming utilities
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: src/context (Context), src/utils/stream (StreamingApi), ./utils (isOldBunVersion)
+-
